text: It's a pleasure to meet you

definitions.example: Let me show you to your desk.
Thanks for showing me around the place, Maria.

definitions.def: A desk designed to be used while standing up.
definitions.example: Is this one of those standing desks?

definitions.def: Designed for efficiency and comfort in the working environment.
definitions.example: A standing desk, an ergonomic chair, and an ergonomic mouse.

definitions.def: The most advanced; innovative.
definitions.example: You're going to like it here if you're into cutting-edge gadgets.
At this company they're very attentive to these details.
Is the café within walking distance?

definitions.def: A card used to gain entry to a building or area.
definitions.example: I'm here to give you your access card.

definitions.def: Relating to technology that does not require physical contact.
definitions.example: Is it contactless?

definitions.def: To pass a card through an electronic reader.
definitions.example: It's the good-old swipe at the door.

definitions.def: A person responsible for planning and overseeing a project.
definitions.example: I'm Bob, the project manager.

definitions.def: An experienced software developer with advanced skills.
definitions.example: This is Sarah, the senior software developer.

definitions.def: An entry-level software developer.
definitions.example: I'm starting as a junior developer today.

definitions.def: A person who manages and maintains a database system.
definitions.example: This is John, the database administrator.

definitions.def: A designer focused on user experience and interface design.
definitions.example: This is Linda, our UX/UI designer.

definitions.def: A developer who builds the visual part of websites and apps.
definitions.example: She's our new front-end developer.

definitions.def: Easy to use or understand.
definitions.example: She loves creating user-friendly interfaces.
You can talk to her any time, even in this virtual setting.
He's your go-to guy for that.

definitions.def: A list of items to be discussed at a meeting.
definitions.example: Here are the topics on today's agenda.

definitions.def: To give help or support to.
definitions.example: I can't wait to start contributing to our projects.

definitions.def: To work jointly with others.
definitions.example: I really want to collaborate with you.
I'll be your point of contact.
How about the team-building activities here?
Are you into board games?

definitions.def: Taking action before problems arise rather than reacting to them.
definitions.example: She's very proactive and she likes everything in order.
She assigns tasks and makes sure everything runs well.
It helps me stay on track.
The team discusses project updates.

definitions.def: To determine the order for dealing with tasks.
definitions.example: I review my to-do list for the day and prioritize my tasks.

definitions.def: To identify and remove errors from software.
definitions.example: I work on coding, test the websites, and debug issues.

definitions.def: A list of tasks to be completed.
definitions.example: I review my to-do list for the day.

definitions.def: To access a computer system by entering credentials.
definitions.example: The first thing to do is log in to your computer.

definitions.def: A meeting where team members share ideas freely.
definitions.example: Does this include brainstorming sessions?
Do we discuss all our ongoing projects in these meetings?

definitions.def: An identification card granting access to a secure area.
definitions.example: I have to issue security badges to new employees.

definitions.def: The selective restriction of access to a place or resource.
definitions.example: Access control is crucial.
I can't forget to revoke access for the people who leave the company.

definitions.def: A routine check of a facility for security purposes.
definitions.example: I conduct regular security sweeps.
I'm here to improve my project management skills.

definitions.def: A person you work alongside.
definitions.example: Sophie is a great workmate. She's very kind and helpful.

definitions.def: The person responsible for guiding a team.
definitions.example: I'm Maria, the team lead.

definitions.def: The area or environment where one works.
definitions.example: That's your workspace.

definitions.def: A software application designed for mobile devices.
definitions.example: I developed mobile apps for small businesses.
